vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but requires immediate revision based on visual evidence.

inventory_reconciliation.P1 (Yellow Pot): Present. String of Nickels appears dormant or in decline.
inventory_reconciliation.P2 (Black Pot): Systemic Loss. No evidence of Mexican Mint; soil appears empty or contains only debris.
inventory_reconciliation.P3 (Black Pot): Present. Pothos specimen is present, accompanied by the white rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4 (Black Pot): New Introduction/Intervention. A single, solitary sprout (likely an Alocasia or similar monocot) is present in the soil previously associated with P2/P4 space.

plant_audit.P1: Stagnant. No visible growth or change in leaf count over the 5-day period.
plant_audit.P3: Stable. The Pothos leaf remains consistent; the white rabbit anchor is stationary.
plant_audit.P4: Active. The single sprout shows a slight change in orientation/turgor, indicating slow growth.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently damp/dark; no signs of surface cracking.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of white debris (likely perlite or eggshell fragments) in P3 and P4.

temporal_deltas.T-4_to_T-3: Minor shift in light reflection on the P4 sprout.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: P4 sprout appears slightly more upright.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Stable state; no further growth observed.

anomalies: The P4 sprout is not in the original registry.
The P2 pot is devoid of the registered Mexican Mint.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of low-activity. P3 remains the most stable element, anchored by the rabbit figurine. P2 has suffered a total loss of its registered occupant. P4 has emerged as a new, singular botanical presence, showing slow but steady development. P1 remains largely unchanged, suggesting a period of dormancy or environmental stress.
